creator: herbert@gojira.at
text: No idea why it worked before and now fails but why do you set WANT_OPENLDAP_VER=26/WITH_OPENLDAP_VER=26 in /etc/make.conf? Default OPENLDAP version is 2.6. If you want a different version (e.g. 2.5) set DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=openldap=25 in /etc/make.conf. Have you tried to 'pkg delete openldap-client' and rebuild sudo afterwards?
